title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned about Claude's expanding role in AI development, where the model now writes code, reviews code, runs experiments, and assists in building better AI systems. OpenAI and other labs are similarly concerned about recursive self-improvement and governance challenges as AI systems take on more autonomous roles in their own development.
